title: Walking Stick with Seat, Foldable Cane for Seniors, Travel Lightweight, Load 200kg, Aluminium, Height Maximum 90cm Adjustable
features: Durable Construction:This walking stick is crafted from aluminium materials,built to last. Its anti-slip, anti-rust design ensures reliable support in all conditions, making it the perfect durable walking cane for seniors and travelers
Lightweight & Portable:Weighing just enough for stability yet lightweight for easy carrying, this foldable walking stick is great for travel, trade shows, or daily errands

2-in-1 Walking Cane & Seat:Open it into a comfortable seat walking stick for a relaxing break. Fold it back into a stable support cane for steady mobility, height adjustable up to 90cm, ideal for long walks, shopping, or outdoor adventures
Anti-Slip Rubber Tips for Safety:Equipped with non-slip plastic tips, this anti-slip walking stick protects floors and carpets from scratches while providing secure traction on any surface

Multiple occasions:From waiting in lines to exploring outdoors, this versatile walking cane with seat is a must-have for seniors, travelers, and anyone needing extra support. Great for shopping, hiking, or events
description: Specification: Item Type: Crutch Material: Aluminium Alloy+Rubber Max Load Capacity: 200kg Package： 1 x Foldable Crutch Note: 1. Please allow 1-3 cm error due to the manual measurement. Thanks for your understanding. 2. Monitors are not calibrated same, item color displayed in photos may be showing slightly. 3. Suitable for people under 190cm in height.
